steps.instruction: Open Finder
Navigate to the folder you want to compress
Right-click the folder
Click Compress
Look at the top-right menu bar for the Battery icon
Click the Wi-Fi icon in the menu bar
Click the network you want to connect to
Press Command + Shift + 3 for a full-screen screenshot
Click the Apple menu in the top-left corner
Click System Settings
Click Appearance in the sidebar
Choose Dark or Light
Click the Finder icon in the Dock
Click Trash in the sidebar
Click Empty in the top-right corner
Click the Control Center icon in the menu bar
Drag the Sound slider to adjust volume
Press Command + Option + Escape
Select the frozen app and click Force Quit
Click the Apple menu in the top-left corner
Click System Settings
Click Wallpaper in the sidebar
Click the wallpaper you want to use
Click the Apple menu in the top-left corner
Click System Settings
Click Displays in the sidebar
Click Night Shift
Set the Schedule to Sunset to Sunrise or turn on Manually
Click the Apple menu in the top-left corner
Click System Settings
Click Bluetooth in the sidebar
Click the toggle to turn Bluetooth on
Click the Apple menu in the top-left corner
Click System Settings
Click Bluetooth in the sidebar
Click the toggle to turn Bluetooth off
Click the Apple menu in the top-left corner
Click System Settings
Click Network in the sidebar
Click Firewall
Click the toggle to enable the Firewall
Click the Apple menu in the top-left corner
Click System Settings
Click General in the sidebar
Click Storage
Click the Apple menu in the top-left corner
Click System Settings
Click Screen Saver in the sidebar
Click the screen saver you want to use
Click the Apple menu in the top-left corner
Click System Settings
Click General in the sidebar
Click Date & Time
Click the Time Zone field and type your city or timezone
Click the Apple menu in the top-left corner
Click System Settings
Click Printers & Scanners in the sidebar
Click Add Printer, Scanner or Fax
Click the Apple menu in the top-left corner
Click System Settings
Click General in the sidebar
Click Language & Region
Click Add Language to add a new language
Click the Apple menu in the top-left corner
Click System Settings
Click Keyboard in the sidebar
Toggle Dictation on
Click the Apple menu in the top-left corner
Click System Settings
Click Mouse in the sidebar
Drag the Tracking Speed slider to adjust how fast the cursor moves
Click the Apple menu in the top-left corner
Click System Settings
Click Trackpad in the sidebar
Drag the Tracking Speed slider to your preference
Click the Apple menu in the top-left corner
Click System Settings
Click Desktop & Dock in the sidebar
Toggle Automatically hide and show the Dock on
steps.elementName: Automatically hide and show the Dock

steps.instruction: Click the Apple menu in the top-left corner
Click System Settings
Click Desktop & Dock in the sidebar
Toggle Magnification on
Click the Apple menu in the top-left corner
Click System Settings
Click Desktop & Dock in the sidebar
Click the Position on screen popup and choose Left, Bottom, or Right
Click the Apple menu in the top-left corner
Click System Settings
Click Desktop & Dock in the sidebar
Scroll down and click Hot Corners
Click each corner popup and choose an action
Click the Apple menu in the top-left corner
Click System Settings
Click Accessibility in the sidebar
Click Zoom
Toggle Use keyboard shortcut to zoom on
Click the Apple menu in the top-left corner
Click System Settings
Click Accessibility in the sidebar
Click Display
Toggle Increase contrast on
Click the Apple menu in the top-left corner
Click System Settings
Click Accessibility in the sidebar
Click VoiceOver
Toggle VoiceOver on
Click the Apple menu in the top-left corner
Click System Settings
Click Lock Screen in the sidebar
Click the Require password popup and choose a time
Click the Apple menu in the top-left corner
Click System Settings
Click Notifications in the sidebar
Click the app whose notifications you want to change
Click the Control Center icon in the menu bar
Click Focus
Click Do Not Disturb or the Focus you want to enable
Click the Apple menu in the top-left corner
Click System Settings
Click Screen Time in the sidebar
Click the Apple menu in the top-left corner
Click System Settings
Click your name at the top of the sidebar
Click iCloud

guides.title: Create a New Folder in Finder

steps.instruction: Click on the Finder window where you want the new folder
Click File in the menu bar
Click New Folder
Type the name for your new folder and press Return
Open a Finder window
Press Command + Shift + . (period) to toggle hidden files on
Click the file or folder you want info on
Click File in the menu bar
Click Get Info
Click View in the Finder menu bar
Click Show Path Bar
Click Go in the Finder menu bar
Click Downloads
Click Go in the Finder menu bar
Click Applications
Click Go in the Finder menu bar
Click Desktop
Click Go in the Finder menu bar
Click Go to Folder
Type the folder path and press Go
Click Go in the Finder menu bar
Click Connect to Server
Type the server address and click Connect
Click the file you want to duplicate
Click File in the menu bar
Click Duplicate
Click View in the Finder menu bar
Click as List
Click View in the Finder menu bar
Click as Columns
Click View in the Finder menu bar
Click as Icons
Open Finder and look for the drive in the sidebar
Click the Eject button next to the drive name in the sidebar
Press Command + Space to open Spotlight
Type 'Activity Monitor' and press Return
Press Command + Space to open Spotlight
Type 'Terminal' and press Return
Press Command + Space to open Spotlight
Type 'Disk Utility' and press Return
Click the Apple menu in the top-left corner
Click About This Mac
Press Control + Command + Q to lock the screen immediately
Click the Apple menu in the top-left corner
Click Sleep
Click the Apple menu in the top-left corner
Click Shut Down
Click Shut Down to confirm
Click the Apple menu in the top-left corner
Click Restart
Click Restart to confirm
Click the Apple menu in the top-left corner
Click Log Out
Click Log Out to confirm
Swipe up with three or four fingers on the trackpad, or press the Mission Control key (F3)
Swipe up with three fingers to open Mission Control
Click the + button in the top-right corner to add a new Desktop
Click Go in the Finder menu bar
Click AirDrop
Press Command + Shift + 5 to open the screenshot toolbar
Click Record Entire Screen or Record Selected Portion
Click Record to start
Press Command + Shift + 5 to open the screenshot and recording toolbar
Open Safari
Click History in the menu bar
Click Clear History
Choose a time range and click Clear History
Open Safari
Click File in the menu bar
Click New Private Window
Open Safari
Press Command + T to open a new tab
Navigate to the page you want to bookmark in Safari
Click Bookmarks in the menu bar
Click Add Bookmark
Click Add to save the bookmark
Open an article or web page in Safari
Click the Reader button (lines icon) on the left of the address bar
Open Notes
Click New Note in the toolbar
Start typing your note
Open Notes
Right-click the note you want to pin in the notes list
Click Pin Note
Open Notes
Right-click the note you want to delete
Click Delete Note
Open Reminders
Click New Reminder or press Command + N
Type your reminder and press Return
Open Reminders
Click Add List at the bottom of the sidebar
Type the name for your new list and press Return
Open Calendar
Click the + button or press Command + N to create a new event
Type the event name and press Return
Open Mail
Click the Compose button (pencil icon) in the toolbar
Type the recipient's email address in the To field
Open Mail
Click the Search field in the top-right and type your search
Open Mail and click the email you want to flag
Click Message in the menu bar
Click Flag and choose a color
Click the Launchpad icon in the Dock (the rocket icon), or pinch with thumb and three fingers on the trackpad
Click the App Store icon in the Dock or Launchpad
Click the Apple menu in the top-left corner
Click System Settings
Click General in the sidebar
Click Software Update
Click the Control Center icon in the menu bar
Drag the Display brightness slider up or down
Click the Wi-Fi icon in the menu bar
Click the Wi-Fi toggle to turn it on
Click the Wi-Fi icon in the menu bar
Click the Wi-Fi toggle to turn it off
Press Command + M to minimize the current window, or click the yellow minimize button in the top-left of the window
Press Control + Command + F to toggle full screen, or click and hold the green full-screen button in the top-left of the window
Click on the app you want to quit to make it active
Press Command + Q to quit, or click the app name in the menu bar and choose Quit
Click the file you want to preview in Finder
Press the Space bar to open Quick Look
Right-click the file or folder in Finder
Click Make Alias
Click the Apple menu in the top-left corner
Click System Settings
Click General in the sidebar
Click AirDrop & Handoff
Toggle Allow Handoff between this Mac and your iCloud devices on

guides.title: Add a Folder to Finder Sidebar

steps.instruction: Navigate to the folder you want to add in Finder
Drag the folder into the Finder sidebar
Press Command + Space to open Spotlight
Type 'Console' and press Return
Click the Apple menu in the top-left corner
Click System Settings
Click Trackpad in the sidebar
Toggle Secondary click on and choose Two Finger Tap or Bottom Right Corner
